title: Eva 4 Dating Sim
wikitext:
[]: Eva 4 Dating Sim             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Nov 08, 2005 3:51 pm Any body else ever played it? Its pretty stupid and cheap looking, but it makes up for being so stupid that it's funny: http://www.vx4.com/strategy-games/eva-4-dating-simulator-game.html

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 08, 2005 3:57 pm Also found at http://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/117511 along with their other demented NGE offerings. So - who killed Kaji?

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Nov 08, 2005 4:05 pm Mr. Tines wrote: So - who killed Kaji?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 08, 2005 4:11 pm *sigh* That was a reference to the game. It's how you manage to [spoiler eradicated]!

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Nov 08, 2005 4:21 pm It was just an unknown assailant sent to kill Kaji. Not Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 08, 2005 4:31 pm I shall type this very slowly for the benefit of the slow of uptake. In the flash game, at one point, one of the options offered is to kill Kaji (as opposed to, uh, "write off" Kaworu). Just depends who you've set your sights on.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Tue Nov 08, 2005 4:33 pm Man you're anoying! Good thing you're just a figmant of my imagination.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Tue Nov 08, 2005 5:00 pm I've played it. I've beaten it. I've lost in it. It's an alright sim-game. But it's pretty old. Don't mind the dialogue... You should read the 'Sex Kitten Sim-Date RPG' game's dialogue. It's insanely out of proportion to what the characters seem to be. Forkhead.tk people make wierd flash games, but they can be funny at times.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Wed Nov 09, 2005 1:56 am http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=778

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Wed Nov 09, 2005 2:23 am poetic_assassin wrote: Man you're anoying! Good thing you're just a figmant of my imagination.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Wed Nov 09, 2005 6:11 am Heh, yeah. There are also those comical options... It's pretty funny to see the character's reaction to a bad answer.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Wed Nov 09, 2005 6:39 am I love it when Rei kills me ^^ the music effects are very stupid though :P

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Wed Nov 09, 2005 2:57 pm Heidroch wrote: poetic_assassin wrote: Man you're anoying! Good thing you're just a figmant of my imagination.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Wed Nov 09, 2005 2:59 pm I killed Kaji-san! :twisted: (I hadn't played the Asuka story :P)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 09, 2005 5:59 pm This person got what I was on about... Six Winged Angel wrote: I killed Kaji-san! :twisted: (I hadn't played the Asuka story :P)

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Fri Nov 18, 2005 3:04 am Along with "who shot Kaji", the game also gives the answer to the Rei vs. Asuka debate: Rei: ARGHH I'm gonna rip your eyes out!!! (Rei rips Asuka's eyes out) Asuka:!!!!! Time for your head to come off! (Asuka removes Rei's head with a plastic bucket and spade some kid left on the beach).

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Nov 18, 2005 3:07 pm Woah I've never seen that before and I've beat the game twice. But I did LOL when I got to stab Kaworu in the eye with a pen.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Fri Nov 18, 2005 6:41 pm I never got to kill anybody, all I got was Rei confessing to me that she eats sand. WTF. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Nov 18, 2005 6:56 pm You have to have defeated each of the angels at least once to get to that sort of end-game.

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Nov 18, 2005 7:07 pm sachiel wrote: I never got to kill anybody, all I got was Rei confessing to me that she eats sand. WTF. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 08, 2005 3:57 pm Also found at http://www.newgrounds.com
